response.step_by_step_log: The video features a performance of 'Paradise Lost' by three Hololive virtual YouTubers (Omaru Polka, Shirakami Fubuki, and Shishiro Botan). The song title 'Paradise Lost' is clearly visible in the lower-left corner during the performance. The song 'Paradise Lost' is originally by Minori Chihara (from the anime Ga-Rei: Zero). I performed a search for '"Paradise Lost" Minori Chihara Japanese and English lyrics' and successfully retrieved the lyrics for the song.
response.global_summary: A performance of the song 'Paradise Lost' by Hololive members (Shirakami Fubuki, Omaru Polka, and Shishiro Botan). The video features a choreographed dance on a stage with special lighting effects.

scenes.description: The video begins with Omaru Polka on stage, then transitions to a group performance of 'Paradise Lost' featuring Polka, Fubuki, and Botan. Text 'Paradise Lost' appears on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Omaru Polka, Shirakami Fubuki, Shishiro Botan
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Seinaru hitomi ga itami wo utsushitara
Furimuite goran
Jounetsu hanatsu Trick
Kuzureru ashimoto futari wa modorenai
Sashinobeta te wo hodokanaide

Kieru yo mata yasashii hibi ga
Omoide wo kegasu no wa
Yurusenai
Koko wa uragiri no ki nano
Samayou kokoro no hate ni

Hikari wo motomete
Inoru kotoba todoke arata ni

Toraware no hane ga
Haruka na sora e to mukau

Shinjitai yo watashitachi
Kodoku ja nai

Wakariau
Kizuna no naka

Hanasanaide
Hajimaru Destiny

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If the holy eyes reflect the pain
Turn around and look
The passion that is released is a Trick
The crumbling footing, the two cannot return
Do not let go of the hand you reached out

Disappearing, again, the gentle days
I cannot forgive the tainting of memories
This is a tree of betrayal
Wandering in the ends of my heart

Seek the light
And send prayers to the new

The wings of obsession
Fly away into the distant sky

I want to believe, we
Are not alone

Understand each other
In the bonds

Don't let go
The destiny that starts
